dwc.name: Darwin Core
dwc.description: Darwin Core standard terms for biodiversity data

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/catalogNumb.name: catalogNumber
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/catalogNumb.description: An identifier for the record within the data set or collection

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordedBy.name: recordedBy
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordedBy.description: A person, group, or organization responsible for recording the original Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/individualC.name: individualCount
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/individualC.description: The number of individuals present at the time of the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sex.name: sex
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sex.description: The sex of the biological individual(s) represented in the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lifeStage.name: lifeStage
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lifeStage.description: The age class or life stage of the Organism(s) at the time the Occurrence was recorded

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/reproductiv.name: reproductiveCondition
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/reproductiv.description: The reproductive condition of the biological individual(s) represented in the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/behavior.name: behavior
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/behavior.description: The behavior shown by the subject at the time the Occurrence was recorded

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/preparation.name: preparations
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/preparation.description: A list of preparations and preservation methods for a specimen

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/disposition.name: disposition
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/disposition.description: The current state of a specimen with respect to the collection identified in collectionCode

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/otherCatalo.name: otherCatalogNumbers
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/otherCatalo.description: A list of previous or alternate fully qualified catalog numbers

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/occurrenceR.name: occurrenceRemarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/occurrenceR.description: Comments or notes about the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventDate.name: eventDate
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventDate.description: The date-time or interval during which an Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventTime.name: eventTime
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventTime.description: The time or interval during which an Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/startDayOfY.name: startDayOfYear
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/startDayOfY.description: The earliest integer day of the year on which the Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/endDayOfYea.name: endDayOfYear
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/endDayOfYea.description: The latest integer day of the year on which the Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/year.name: year
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/year.description: The four-digit year in which the Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/month.name: month
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/month.description: The integer month in which the Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/day.name: day
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/day.description: The integer day of the month on which the Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimEve.name: verbatimEventDate
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimEve.description: The verbatim original representation of the date and time information for an Event

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/habitat.name: habitat
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/habitat.description: A category or description of the habitat in which the Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/samplingPro.name: samplingProtocol
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/samplingPro.description: The names of, references to, or descriptions of the methods or protocols used during an Event

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/fieldNumber.name: fieldNumber
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/fieldNumber.description: An identifier given to the event in the field

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventRemark.name: eventRemarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventRemark.description: Comments or notes about the Event

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/continent.name: continent
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/continent.description: The name of the continent in which the Location occurs

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/country.name: country
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/country.description: The name of the country or major administrative unit in which the Location occurs

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/countryCode.name: countryCode
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/countryCode.description: The standard code for the country in which the Location occurs

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/stateProvin.name: stateProvince
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/stateProvin.description: The name of the next smaller administrative region than country

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/county.name: county
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/county.description: The full, unabbreviated name of the next smaller administrative region than stateProvince

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/municipalit.name: municipality
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/municipalit.description: The full, unabbreviated name of the next smaller administrative region than county

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locality.name: locality
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locality.description: The specific description of the place

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLoc.name: verbatimLocality
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLoc.description: The original textual description of the place

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumElev.name: minimumElevationInMeters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumElev.description: The lower limit of the range of elevation

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumElev.name: maximumElevationInMeters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumElev.description: The upper limit of the range of elevation

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLati.name: decimalLatitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLati.description: The geographic latitude in decimal degrees of the geographic center of a Location

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLong.name: decimalLongitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLong.description: The geographic longitude in decimal degrees of the geographic center of a Location

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/geodeticDat.name: geodeticDatum
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/geodeticDat.description: The ellipsoid, geodetic datum, or spatial reference system used in decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateU.name: coordinateUncertaintyInMeters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateU.description: The horizontal distance from the given decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude describing the smallest circle containing the whole of the Location

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.name: verbatimCoordinates
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.description: The verbatim original spatial coordinates of the Location

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLat.name: verbatimLatitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLat.description: The verbatim original latitude of the Location

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLon.name: verbatimLongitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLon.description: The verbatim original longitude of the Location

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/kingdom.name: kingdom
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/kingdom.description: The full scientific name of the kingdom in which the taxon is classified

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/phylum.name: phylum
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/phylum.description: The full scientific name of the phylum in which the taxon is classified

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/class.name: class
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/class.description: The full scientific name of the class in which the taxon is classified

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/order.name: order
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/order.description: The full scientific name of the order in which the taxon is classified

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/family.name: family
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/family.description: The full scientific name of the family in which the taxon is classified

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/genus.name: genus
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/genus.description: The full scientific name of the genus in which the taxon is classified

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/specificEpi.name: specificEpithet
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/specificEpi.description: The name of the first or species epithet of the scientificName

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/infraspecif.name: infraspecificEpithet
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/infraspecif.description: The name of the lowest or terminal infraspecific epithet of the scientificName

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonRank.name: taxonRank
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonRank.description: The taxonomic rank of the most specific name in the scientificName

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.name: scientificName
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.description: The full scientific name, with authorship and date information if known

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.name: scientificNameAuthorship
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.description: The authorship information for the scientificName

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherClass.name: higherClassification
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherClass.description: A list of taxa names terminating at the rank immediately superior to the referenced taxon

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonomicSt.name: taxonomicStatus
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonomicSt.description: The status of the use of the scientificName as a label for a taxon

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/basisOfReco.name: basisOfRecord
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/basisOfReco.description: The specific nature of the data record

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/institution.name: institutionCode
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/institution.description: The name or acronym in use by the institution having custody of the object(s) or information referred to in the record

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/collectionC.name: collectionCode
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/collectionC.description: The name, acronym, coden, or initialism identifying the collection or data set from which the record was derived

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/datasetName.name: datasetName
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/datasetName.description: The name identifying the data set from which the record was derived

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/ownerInstit.name: ownerInstitutionCode
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/ownerInstit.description: The name or acronym in use by the institution having ownership of the object(s) or information referred to in the record

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/information.name: informationWithheld
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/information.description: Additional information that exists, but that has not been shared in the given record

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dataGeneral.name: dataGeneralizations
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dataGeneral.description: Actions taken to make the shared data less specific or complete than in its original form

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identifiedB.name: identifiedBy
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identifiedB.description: A person, group, or organization who assigned the Taxon to the subject

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dateIdentif.name: dateIdentified
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dateIdentif.description: The date on which the subject was determined as representing the Taxon

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.name: identificationRemarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.description: Comments or notes about the Identification

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/typeStatus.name: typeStatus
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/typeStatus.description: A list of nomenclatural types applied to the subject

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedM.name: associatedMedia
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedM.description: A list of identifiers of media associated with the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedR.name: associatedReferences
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedR.description: A list of identifiers of literature associated with the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedS.name: associatedSequences
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedS.description: A list of identifiers of genetic sequence information associated with the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedT.name: associatedTaxa
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedT.description: A list of identifiers or names of taxa and the associations of this Occurrence to each of them

http://purl.org/dc/terms/accessRights.name: accessRights
http://purl.org/dc/terms/accessRights.description: Information about who can access the resource or an indication of its security status.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/bibliographicCi.name: bibliographicCitation
http://purl.org/dc/terms/bibliographicCi.description: A bibliographic reference for the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/license.name: license
http://purl.org/dc/terms/license.description: A legal document giving official permission to do something with the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.name: modified
http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.description: Date on which the resource was changed.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/references.name: references
http://purl.org/dc/terms/references.description: A related resource that is referenced, cited, or otherwise pointed to by the described resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/rightsHolder.name: rightsHolder
http://purl.org/dc/terms/rightsHolder.description: A person or organization owning or managing rights over the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/type.name: type
http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/type.description: The nature or genre of the resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedO.name: associatedOccurrences
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedO.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of identifiers of other dwc:Occurrence records and their associations to this dwc:Occurrence.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/caste.name: caste
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/caste.description: Categorisation of individuals for eusocial species (including some mammals and arthropods).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/degreeOfEst.name: degreeOfEstablishment
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/degreeOfEst.description: The degree to which a dwc:Organism survives, reproduces, and expands its range at the given place and time.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/establishme.name: establishmentMeans
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/establishme.description: Statement about whether a dwc:Organism has been introduced to a given place and time through the direct or indirect activity of modern humans.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: georeferenceVerificationStatus
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: A categorical description of the extent to which the georeference has been verified to represent the best possible spatial description for the dcterms:Location of the dwc:Occurrence.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/occurrenceS.name: occurrenceStatus
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/occurrenceS.description: A statement about the presence or absence of a dwc:Taxon at a dcterms:Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismQua.name: organismQuantity
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismQua.description: A number or enumeration value for the quantity of dwc:Organisms.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismQua.name: organismQuantityType
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismQua.description: The type of quantification system used for the quantity of dwc:Organisms.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/pathway.name: pathway
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/pathway.description: The process by which a dwc:Organism came to be in a given place at a given time.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordNumbe.name: recordNumber
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordNumbe.description: An identifier given to the dwc:Occurrence at the time it was recorded.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordedByI.name: recordedByID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordedByI.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of the globally unique identifier for the person, people, groups, or organizations responsible for recording the original dwc:Occurrence.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/vitality.name: vitality
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/vitality.description: An indication of whether a dwc:Organism was alive or dead at the time of collection or observation.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedO.name: associatedOrganisms
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedO.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of identifiers of other dwc:Organisms and the associations of this dwc:Organism to each of them.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/causeOfDeat.name: causeOfDeath
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/causeOfDeat.description: An indication of the known or suspected cause of death of a dwc:Organism.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismID.name: organismID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismID.description: An identifier for the dwc:Organism instance (as opposed to a particular digital record of the dwc:Organism).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismNam.name: organismName
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismNam.description: A textual name or label assigned to a dwc:Organism instance.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismRem.name: organismRemarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismRem.description: Comments or notes about the dwc:Organism instance.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismSco.name: organismScope
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismSco.description: A description of the kind of dwc:Organism instance.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/previousIde.name: previousIdentifications
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/previousIde.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of previous assignments of names to the dwc:Organism.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/digitalSpec.name: digitalSpecimenID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/digitalSpec.description: An identifier for a particular instance of a Digital Specimen.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialEnt.name: materialEntityID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialEnt.description: An identifier for a particular instance of a dwc:MaterialEntity.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialEnt.name: materialEntityRemarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialEnt.description: Comments or notes about the dwc:MaterialEntity instance.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialEnt.name: materialEntityType
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialEnt.description: A category that best matches the nature of a dwc:MaterialEntity.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLab.name: verbatimLabel
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLab.description: The content of this term should include no embellishments, prefixes, headers or other additions made to the text.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialSam.name: materialSampleID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialSam.description: An identifier for the dwc:MaterialSample (as opposed to a particular digital record of the dwc:MaterialSample).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventID.name: eventID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventID.description: An identifier for the set of information associated with a dwc:Event (something that occurs at a place and time).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/fieldNotes.name: fieldNotes
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/fieldNotes.description: One of a) an indicator of the existence of, b) a reference to (publication, URI), or c) the text of notes taken in the field about the dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/fundingAttri.name: fundingAttribution
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/fundingAttri.description: Text description of organizations or individuals who funded the creation of the resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/fundingAttr.name: fundingAttributionID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/fundingAttr.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of the globally unique identifiers for the funding organizations or agencies that supported the project.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentEvent.name: parentEventID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentEvent.description: An identifier for the broader dwc:Event that groups this and potentially other dwc:Events.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/projectID.name: projectID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/projectID.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of identifiers for projects that contributed to a dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/projectTitl.name: projectTitle
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/projectTitl.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of titles or names for projects that contributed to a dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sampleSizeU.name: sampleSizeUnit
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sampleSizeU.description: The unit of measurement of the size (time duration, length, area, or volume) of a sample in a sampling dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sampleSizeV.name: sampleSizeValue
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sampleSizeV.description: A numeric value for a measurement of the size (time duration, length, area, or volume) of a sample in a sampling dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/samplingEff.name: samplingEffort
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/samplingEff.description: The amount of effort expended during a dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateP.name: coordinatePrecision
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateP.description: A decimal representation of the precision of the coordinates given in the dwc:decimalLatitude and dwc:decimalLongitude.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintSR.name: footprintSRS
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintSR.description: The ellipsoid, geodetic datum, or spatial reference system (SRS) upon which the geometry given in dwc:footprintWKT is based.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintSp.name: footprintSpatialFit
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintSp.description: The ratio of the area of the dwc:footprintWKT to the area of the true (original, or most specific) spatial representation of the dcterms:Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintWK.name: footprintWKT
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintWK.description: A Well-Known Text (WKT) representation of the shape (footprint, geometry) that defines the dcterms:Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: georeferenceProtocol
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: A description or reference to the methods used to determine the spatial footprint, coordinates, and uncertainties.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: georeferenceRemarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: Comments or notes about the spatial description determination, explaining assumptions made in addition or opposition to the those formalized in the method referred to in dwc:georeferenceProtocol.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: georeferenceSources
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of maps, gazetteers, or other resources used to georeference the dcterms:Location, described specifically enough to allow anyone in the future to use the same resources.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: georeferencedBy
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of names of people, groups, or organizations who determined the georeference (spatial representation) for the dcterms:Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: georeferencedDate
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: The date on which the dcterms:Location was georeferenced.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherGeogr.name: higherGeography
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherGeogr.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of geographic names less specific than the information captured in the dwc:locality term.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherGeogr.name: higherGeographyID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherGeogr.description: An identifier for the geographic region within which the dcterms:Location occurred.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/island.name: island
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/island.description: The name of the island on or near which the dcterms:Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/islandGroup.name: islandGroup
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/islandGroup.description: The name of the island group in which the dcterms:Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationAcc.name: locationAccordingTo
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationAcc.description: Information about the source of this dcterms:Location information.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationID.name: locationID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationID.description: An identifier for the set of dcterms:Location information.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationRem.name: locationRemarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationRem.description: Comments or notes about the dcterms:Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumDept.name: maximumDepthInMeters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumDept.description: The greater depth of a range of depth below the local surface, in meters.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumDist.name: maximumDistanceAboveSurfaceInMeters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumDist.description: The greater distance in a range of distance from a reference surface in the vertical direction, in meters.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumDept.name: minimumDepthInMeters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumDept.description: The lesser depth of a range of depth below the local surface, in meters.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumDist.name: minimumDistanceAboveSurfaceInMeters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumDist.description: The lesser distance in a range of distance from a reference surface in the vertical direction, in meters.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/pointRadius.name: pointRadiusSpatialFit
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/pointRadius.description: The ratio of the area of the point-radius (dwc:decimalLatitude, dwc:decimalLongitude, dwc:coordinateUncertaintyInMeters) to the area of the true (original, or most specific) spatial representation of the dcterms:Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.name: verbatimCoordinateSystem
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.description: The coordinate format for the dwc:verbatimLatitude and dwc:verbatimLongitude or the dwc:verbatimCoordinates of the dcterms:Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimDep.name: verbatimDepth
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimDep.description: The original description of the depth below the local surface.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimEle.name: verbatimElevation
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimEle.description: The original description of the elevation (altitude, usually above sea level) of the Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimSRS.name: verbatimSRS
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimSRS.description: The ellipsoid, geodetic datum, or spatial reference system (SRS) upon which coordinates given in dwc:verbatimLatitude and dwc:verbatimLongitude, or dwc:verbatimCoordinates are based.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verticalDat.name: verticalDatum
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verticalDat.description: The vertical datum used as the reference upon which the values in the elevation terms are based.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/waterBody.name: waterBody
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/waterBody.description: The name of the water body in which the dcterms:Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/bed.name: bed
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/bed.description: The full name of the lithostratigraphic bed from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestAge.name: earliestAgeOrLowestStage
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestAge.description: The full name of the earliest possible geochronologic age or lowest chronostratigraphic stage attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestEon.name: earliestEonOrLowestEonothem
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestEon.description: The full name of the earliest possible geochronologic eon or lowest chrono-stratigraphic eonothem or the informal name ("Precambrian") attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestEpo.name: earliestEpochOrLowestSeries
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestEpo.description: The full name of the earliest possible geochronologic epoch or lowest chronostratigraphic series attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestEra.name: earliestEraOrLowestErathem
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestEra.description: The full name of the earliest possible geochronologic era or lowest chronostratigraphic erathem attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestPer.name: earliestPeriodOrLowestSystem
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestPer.description: The full name of the earliest possible geochronologic period or lowest chronostratigraphic system attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/formation.name: formation
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/formation.description: The full name of the lithostratigraphic formation from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/geologicalC.name: geologicalContextID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/geologicalC.description: An identifier for the set of information associated with a dwc:GeologicalContext (the location within a geological context, such as stratigraphy).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/group.name: group
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/group.description: The full name of the lithostratigraphic group from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/highestBios.name: highestBiostratigraphicZone
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/highestBios.description: The full name of the highest possible geological biostratigraphic zone of the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestAgeOr.name: latestAgeOrHighestStage
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestAgeOr.description: The full name of the latest possible geochronologic age or highest chronostratigraphic stage attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestEonOr.name: latestEonOrHighestEonothem
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestEonOr.description: The full name of the latest possible geochronologic eon or highest chrono-stratigraphic eonothem or the informal name ("Precambrian") attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestEpoch.name: latestEpochOrHighestSeries
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestEpoch.description: The full name of the latest possible geochronologic epoch or highest chronostratigraphic series attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestEraOr.name: latestEraOrHighestErathem
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestEraOr.description: The full name of the latest possible geochronologic era or highest chronostratigraphic erathem attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestPerio.name: latestPeriodOrHighestSystem
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestPerio.description: The full name of the latest possible geochronologic period or highest chronostratigraphic system attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lithostrati.name: lithostratigraphicTerms
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lithostrati.description: The combination of all lithostratigraphic names for the rock from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lowestBiost.name: lowestBiostratigraphicZone
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lowestBiost.description: The full name of the lowest possible geological biostratigraphic zone of the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/member.name: member
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/member.description: The full name of the lithostratigraphic member from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.name: identificationID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.description: An identifier for the dwc:Identification (the body of information associated with the assignment of a scientific name).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.name: identificationQualifier
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.description: A brief phrase or a standard term ("cf.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.name: identificationReferences
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of references (publication, global unique identifier, URI) used in the dwc:Identification.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.name: identificationVerificationStatus
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.description: A categorical indicator of the extent to which the taxonomic identification has been verified to be correct.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identifiedB.name: identifiedByID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identifiedB.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of the globally unique identifier for the person, people, groups, or organizations responsible for assigning the dwc:Taxon to the subject.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/typifiedNam.name: typifiedName
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/typifiedNam.description: A scientific name that is based on a type specimen.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimIde.name: verbatimIdentification
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimIde.description: A string representing the taxonomic identification as it appeared in the original record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/acceptedNam.name: acceptedNameUsage
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/acceptedNam.description: The full name, with authorship and date information if known, of the currently valid (zoological) or accepted (botanical) dwc:Taxon.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/acceptedNam.name: acceptedNameUsageID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/acceptedNam.description: An identifier for the name usage (documented meaning of the name according to a source) of the currently valid (zoological) or accepted (botanical) taxon.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/cultivarEpi.name: cultivarEpithet
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/cultivarEpi.description: Part of the name of a cultivar, cultivar group or grex that follows the dwc:scientificName.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/genericName.name: genericName
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/genericName.description: The genus part of the dwc:scientificName without authorship.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/infrageneri.name: infragenericEpithet
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/infrageneri.description: The infrageneric part of a binomial name at ranks above species but below genus.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nameAccordi.name: nameAccordingTo
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nameAccordi.description: The reference to the source in which the specific taxon concept circumscription is defined or implied - traditionally signified by the Latin "sensu" or "sec.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nameAccordi.name: nameAccordingToID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nameAccordi.description: An identifier for the source in which the specific taxon concept circumscription is defined or implied.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/namePublish.name: namePublishedIn
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/namePublish.description: A reference for the publication in which the dwc:scientificName was originally established under the rules of the associated dwc:nomenclaturalCode.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/namePublish.name: namePublishedInID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/namePublish.description: An identifier for the publication in which the dwc:scientificName was originally established under the rules of the associated dwc:nomenclaturalCode.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/namePublish.name: namePublishedInYear
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/namePublish.description: The four-digit year in which the dwc:scientificName was published.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nomenclatur.name: nomenclaturalCode
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nomenclatur.description: The nomenclatural code (or codes in the case of an ambiregnal name) under which the dwc:scientificName is constructed.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nomenclatur.name: nomenclaturalStatus
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nomenclatur.description: The status related to the original publication of the name and its conformance to the relevant rules of nomenclature.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/originalNam.name: originalNameUsage
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/originalNam.description: The taxon name, with authorship and date information if known, as it originally appeared when first established under the rules of the associated dwc:nomenclaturalCode.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/originalNam.name: originalNameUsageID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/originalNam.description: An identifier for the name usage (documented meaning of the name according to a source) in which the terminal element of the dwc:scientificName was originally established under the rules of the associated dwc:nomenclaturalCode.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentNameU.name: parentNameUsage
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentNameU.description: The full name, with authorship and date information if known, of the direct, most proximate higher-rank parent dwc:Taxon (in a classification) of the most specific element of the dwc:scientificName.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentNameU.name: parentNameUsageID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentNameU.description: An identifier for the name usage (documented meaning of the name according to a source) of the direct, most proximate higher-rank parent taxon (in a classification) of the most specific element of the dwc:scientificName.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.name: scientificNameID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.description: An identifier for the nomenclatural (not taxonomic) details of a scientific name.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/subfamily.name: subfamily
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/subfamily.description: The full scientific name of the subfamily in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/subgenus.name: subgenus
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/subgenus.description: The full scientific name of the subgenus in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/subtribe.name: subtribe
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/subtribe.description: The full scientific name of the subtribe in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/superfamily.name: superfamily
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/superfamily.description: The full scientific name of the superfamily in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonConcep.name: taxonConceptID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonConcep.description: An identifier for the taxonomic concept to which the record refers - not for the nomenclatural details of a dwc:Taxon.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonID.name: taxonID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonID.description: An identifier for the set of dwc:Taxon information.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonRemark.name: taxonRemarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonRemark.description: Comments or notes about the taxon or name.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/tribe.name: tribe
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/tribe.description: The full scientific name of the tribe in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimTax.name: verbatimTaxonRank
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimTax.description: The taxonomic rank of the most specific name in the dwc:scientificName as it appears in the original record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: measurementAccuracy
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: The description of the potential error associated with the dwc:measurementValue.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: measurementDeterminedBy
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of names of people, groups, or organizations who determined the value of the dwc:MeasurementOrFact.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: measurementDeterminedDate
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: The date on which the dwc:MeasurementOrFact was made.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: measurementID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: An identifier for the dwc:MeasurementOrFact (information pertaining to measurements, facts, characteristics, or assertions).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: measurementMethod
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: A description of or reference to (publication, URI) the method or protocol used to determine the measurement, fact, characteristic, or assertion.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: measurementRemarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: Comments or notes accompanying the dwc:MeasurementOrFact.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: measurementType
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: The nature of the measurement, fact, characteristic, or assertion.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: measurementUnit
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: The units associated with the dwc:measurementValue.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: measurementValue
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: The value of the measurement, fact, characteristic, or assertion.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentMeasu.name: parentMeasurementID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentMeasu.description: An identifier for a broader dwc:MeasurementOrFact that groups this and potentially other dwc:MeasurementOrFacts.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimMea.name: verbatimMeasurementType
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimMea.description: A string representing the type of measurement or fact as it appeared in the original record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relatedReso.name: relatedResourceID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relatedReso.description: An identifier for a related resource (the object, rather than the subject of the relationship).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.name: relationshipAccordingTo
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.description: The source (person, organization, publication, reference) establishing the relationship between the two resources.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.name: relationshipEstablishedDate
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.description: The date-time on which the relationship between the two resources was established.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.name: relationshipOfResource
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.description: The relationship of the subject (identified by dwc:resourceID) to the object (identified by dwc:relatedResourceID).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.name: relationshipOfResourceID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.description: An identifier for the relationship type (predicate) that connects the subject identified by dwc:resourceID to its object identified by dwc:relatedResourceID.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.name: relationshipRemarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.description: Comments or notes about the relationship between the two resources.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/resourceID.name: resourceID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/resourceID.description: An identifier for the resource that is the subject of the relationship.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/resourceRel.name: resourceRelationshipID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/resourceRel.description: An identifier for an instance of relationship between one resource (the subject) and another (dwc:relatedResource, the object).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/collectionI.name: collectionID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/collectionI.description: An identifier for the collection or dataset from which the record was derived.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/datasetID.name: datasetID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/datasetID.description: An identifier for the set of data.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/discipline.name: discipline
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/discipline.description: The primary branch or branches of knowledge represented by the record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dynamicProp.name: dynamicProperties
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dynamicProp.description: A list of additional measurements, facts, characteristics, or assertions about the record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/feedbackURL.name: feedbackURL
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/feedbackURL.description: A uniform resource locator (URL) that points to a webpage on which a form may be submitted to gather feedback about the record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/institution.name: institutionID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/institution.description: An identifier for the institution having custody of the object(s) or information referred to in the record.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/type.name: type
http://purl.org/dc/terms/type.description: The nature or genre of the resource

http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.name: modified
http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.description: The most recent date-time on which the resource was changed

http://purl.org/dc/terms/license.name: license
http://purl.org/dc/terms/license.description: A legal document giving official permission to do something with the resource

http://purl.org/dc/terms/rightsHolder.name: rightsHolder
http://purl.org/dc/terms/rightsHolder.description: A person or organization owning or managing rights over the resource

http://purl.org/dc/terms/accessRights.name: accessRights
http://purl.org/dc/terms/accessRights.description: Information about who can access the resource or an indication of its security status

http://purl.org/dc/terms/bibliographicCi.name: bibliographicCitation
http://purl.org/dc/terms/bibliographicCi.description: A bibliographic reference for the resource

http://purl.org/dc/terms/references.name: references
http://purl.org/dc/terms/references.description: A related resource that is referenced, cited, or otherwise pointed to by the described resource

ac.name: Audiovisual Core
ac.description: Audiovisual Core terms for multimedia resources

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/accessURI.name: accessURI
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/accessURI.description: A URI that uniquely identifies a service that provides a representation of the underlying resource

http://purl.org/dc/terms/format.name: format
http://purl.org/dc/terms/format.description: The file format, physical medium, or dimensions of the resource

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/subtype.name: subtype
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/subtype.description: Any type term from the vocabulary of types used that further refines the media type

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/caption.name: caption
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/caption.description: Text to be displayed together with the media representation

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/tag.name: tag
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/tag.description: A tag or keyword associated with the media item
